query_normalized: robustness of change‑point detection methods on public financial time series statistics
rationale: The paper investigates non‑parametric change‑point detection methods (pairwise‑distance based) and evaluates their empirical performance, directly addressing the same methodological mechanism (change‑point detection) that the user’s question concerns, even though the application domain is not limited to financial time series. This satisfies inclusion criterion (a).
